title: diosma humilis
intro: Diosma humilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the Cape platypus bush or more specifically the 'False Buchu'. It has been traditionally used in South African folk medicine, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, particularly diosmin, which is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Diosma humilis include relief from urinary tract infections, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Diosma humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
